萧因是一名军事学院毕业的博士生，没成想穿越到了一个穷到没饭吃的傻子身上。
他利用现代的知识，逮兔子、抓野猪、做肉夹馍、开火锅店……一举成为天下最富有之人。
组建特种兵、成立火器营、建立商务部、开创小吃一条街、青砖别墅拔地起、五湖四海皆来朝拜……各国的大臣蒙了，各国的皇帝也蒙了，这个天下到底是谁说了算？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/33fba0792c1d284034e33916166e95ea","author":"挥发中的酒精","author_id":"","book_id":"7217019544789847099","book_name":"穿越后：从傻子开始到天下第一人","book_short_name":"帝国就","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#284840","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6618人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":78,"name":"美食","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=78&name=美食&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":375,"name":"特种兵","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=375&name=特种兵&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":378,"name":"女帝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=378&name=女帝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7217020003957244449","read_count":"6618","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1700529"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.8","serial_count":"789","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,美食,特种兵,女帝,单女主,架空,1v1,无后宫","thumb_url":"https://p3-readin
